narrative:
Cols 76-B (precinct in Franklin County) has 639 registered voters, with 63.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 15.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.3%, a modest Democratic lean of 5.8 percentage points.
